summary: Photo Upload Bug Fix Verification COMPLETE. All 8 backend tests passed, frontend photo upload flow verified working. The fix in api.js (Content-Type: undefined) allows browser to auto-detect multipart boundary for file uploads.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/upload with valid PNG returns 200 with path
Backend: POST /api/upload with non-image file (txt) returns 400
Backend: POST /api/upload with fake PNG (wrong magic bytes) returns 400
Backend: POST /api/cars with photos array saves photos correctly
Backend: GET /api/cars returns cars with photos array intact
Frontend: Registration with phone field works correctly
Frontend: User can navigate to dashboard after registration
Frontend: Open 'Yeni Araç Girişi' modal from sidebar
Frontend: Photo upload button and drag-drop area visible
Frontend: Upload PNG file via file input - photo uploads successfully
Frontend: Photo preview (red thumbnail) appears after upload
Frontend: Save car with photo - car saved successfully
Frontend: Dashboard shows new car in stock count (1/0)
Frontend: Upload error shows alert message (tested via code review)
critical_code_review_comments: The bug fix in api.js line 46 is correct: 'Content-Type': undefined allows axios to auto-set boundary for FormData
PhotoUploadTab component properly shows alert on upload failure (line 31): alert('Fotoğraf yüklenemedi: ' + error message)
Backend uploads.py correctly validates file magic bytes (line 26) preventing fake file uploads
Backend storage.py correctly uses external object storage API with proper authentication
seed_data_creation: Test car created with BMW 3 Serisi, plate 34 TEST 123, with uploaded photo
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo upload bug fix verified working. The fix was in /app/frontend/src/services/api.js line 46 where Content-Type was changed from 'multipart/form-data' to undefined. This allows axios to auto-detect FormData and set proper multipart boundary. Backend upload endpoint at POST /api/upload and file retrieval at GET /api/files/{path}?auth=TOKEN both work correctly. Test PNG file is at /tmp/test.png (2x2 red pixel valid PNG).

mocked_apis.Email sending: MOCKED - verification code returned in register response

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The original code in api.js explicitly set 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' header. This prevented the browser from auto-setting the correct multipart boundary value, which is required for the server to parse the form data correctly.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed Content-Type header to 'undefined' in fileAPI.upload method, allowing axios to automatically detect FormData and set the proper Content-Type with boundary parameter
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Backend tests pass 8/8, frontend photo upload flow verified via Playwright automation
